headline: Fidelity National Information Services Deepens Risk Role Despite Weak Share Performance
summary: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) has launched its Enterprise Risk Suite on Amazon Web Services, giving financial institutions cloud based tools for continuous risk monitoring and system updates. The company’s Supply Chain Finance Platform has been selected to support a $2.55b trade receivables securitization for Glencore PLC, one of the larger transactions of its kind in the oil and gas sector. For investors tracking NYSE:FIS, these moves come at a time when the stock is...
